trans-unit.source: Argument cannot be null or empty.
trans-unit.target: Argument cannot be null or empty.

trans-unit.source: Invalid dependency target value '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Invalid dependency target value '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: The pack options package type must be a string or array of strings in '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: The pack options package type must be a string or array of strings in '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: The {0} value: `{1}` is invalid. Valid example: `{2}`
trans-unit.target: The {0} value: `{1}` is invalid. Valid example: `{2}`
trans-unit.note: {0} - is the attribute {1} is the invalid value of the attribute. {2} a valid attriibute value example

trans-unit.source: Error loading lock file '{0}' : {1}
trans-unit.target: Error loading lock file '{0}' : {1}

trans-unit.source: Error reading '{0}' : {1}
trans-unit.target: Error reading '{0}' : {1}

trans-unit.source: Error reading '{0}' at line {1} column {2} : {3}
trans-unit.target: Error reading '{0}' at line {1} column {2} : {3}

trans-unit.source: Imports contains an invalid framework: '{0}' in '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Imports contains an invalid framework: '{0}' in '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: Problem reading the cache file {0} : {1}
trans-unit.target: Problem reading the cache file {0} : {1}
trans-unit.note: {0} is the file path, {1} is the exception message

trans-unit.source: Package dependencies must specify a version range.
trans-unit.target: Package dependencies must specify a version range.

trans-unit.source: Tools must specify a version range.
trans-unit.target: Tools must specify a version range.

trans-unit.source: None
trans-unit.target: None

trans-unit.source: Central package management file(s) doesn't contain version range for {0} package which is specified as CentralTransitive dependency in the lock file.
trans-unit.target: Central package management file(s) doesn't contain version range for {0} package which is specified as CentralTransitive dependency in the lock file.

trans-unit.source: Version specified in the packages.lock.json file is incompatible. Current tooling supports version {0} and previous formats.
trans-unit.target: Version specified in the packages.lock.json file is incompatible. Current tooling supports version {0} and previous formats.

trans-unit.source: The project target frameworks are different than the lock file's target frameworks. Lock file target frameworks: {0}. Project target frameworks {1}.
trans-unit.target: The project target frameworks are different than the lock file's target frameworks. Lock file target frameworks: {0}. Project target frameworks {1}.
trans-unit.note: 0 - Semicolon delimited list of lock file target frameworks, 1 - semicolon delimited list of lock file target frameworks

trans-unit.source: The project target framework {0} was not found in the lock file.
trans-unit.target: The project target framework {0} was not found in the lock file.

trans-unit.source: A new package reference was found {0} for the project target framework {1}.
trans-unit.target: A new package reference was found {0} for the project target framework {1}.

trans-unit.source: The package reference {0} version has changed from {1} to {2}.
trans-unit.target: The package reference {0} version has changed from {1} to {2}.

trans-unit.source: The package references have changed for {0}. Lock file's package references: {1}, project's package references: {2}.
trans-unit.target: The package references have changed for {0}. Lock file's package references: {1}, project's package references: {2}.
trans-unit.note: 0 - tfm, 1 - lock file package references, 2 - project package references

trans-unit.source: A new project reference to {0} was found for {1} target framework.
trans-unit.target: A new project reference to {0} was found for {1} target framework.

trans-unit.source: The project references {0} whose dependencies has changed.
trans-unit.target: The project references {0} whose dependencies has changed.

trans-unit.source: The project {0} has no compatible target framework.
trans-unit.target: The project {0} has no compatible target framework.

trans-unit.source: The project reference {0} has changed. Current dependencies: {1} lock file's dependencies: {2}.
trans-unit.target: The project reference {0} has changed. Current dependencies: {1} lock file's dependencies: {2}.

trans-unit.source: Transitive dependency {0} moved to be centraly managed invalidated the lock file.
trans-unit.target: Transitive dependency {0} moved to be centraly managed invalidated the lock file.

trans-unit.source: Mistmatch between the requestedVersion of a lock file dependency marked as CentralTransitive and the the version specified in the central package management file. Lock file version {0}, central package management version {1}.
trans-unit.target: Mistmatch between the requestedVersion of a lock file dependency marked as CentralTransitive and the the version specified in the central package management file. Lock file version {0}, central package management version {1}.

trans-unit.source: Restore metadata is mising the required target frameworks list. Please file a bug with repro steps on NuGet/Home if seen.
trans-unit.target: Restore metadata is mising the required target frameworks list. Please file a bug with repro steps on NuGet/Home if seen.

trans-unit.source: The project's runtime identifiers have changed from. Project's runtime identifiers: {0}, lock file's runtime identifiers {1}.
trans-unit.target: The project's runtime identifiers have changed from. Project's runtime identifiers: {0}, lock file's runtime identifiers {1}.

trans-unit.source: Unable to load package spec for {0} project.
trans-unit.target: Unable to load package spec for {0} project.
